utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. All six items appear in the final solution. Now check if each is fully specified with all necessary details per item description: 
- property: includes selected property with details and price (type, address, beds, baths, size, features, price, deposit, closing date) – fully specified. 
- financing: includes financing solution with terms (down payment, mortgage amount, interest rate, monthly payment, amortization, applicant structure) – fully specified. 
- legal_services: includes legal services with costs (provider, service, cost, consultation date) – fully specified. 
- moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs (provider, service, cost, moving date) – fully specified. 
- setup_services: includes utility and setup services (package, included services, providers, cost, timeline, additional service with cost) – fully specified. 
- total_budget: includes complete cost breakdown (line items for purchase, legal, survey, utilities, moving, total investment, remaining budget, target budget range) – fully specified. Therefore, 6/6 items are covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution mentions specific items that correspond to entries in the ground-truth ratings. These are: the purchase property 'Historic Townhouse'; the financing type aligns with 'Traditional Mortgage' under purchase_financing; legal_services corresponds to 'Premium Legal Package'; moving_services corresponds to 'Premium Moving'; and setup_services utility_package corresponds to 'Premium Utilities'. The property survey matches 'Full Structural Survey'. Each of these items has a listed rating in the ground-truth data.
